nodes.label: Rooms Table
nodes.rationale: Stores persistent state for music rooms, including playback status and roles.

nodes.label: Queue Items Table
nodes.rationale: Maintains the list of music tracks added to a room's playback queue.

nodes.label: Chat Messages Table
nodes.rationale: Stores chat history and image references for real-time interaction within a room.

nodes.label: cleanup_stale_rooms Function
nodes.rationale: Server-side logic to automatically remove rooms that have been inactive for over 30 minutes.

nodes.label: YouTube Search API
nodes.rationale: Handles YouTube video searches and enriches results with duration details while managing API keys.

nodes.label: YouTube Fresh API
nodes.rationale: Fetches popular new music videos released within the last 7 days for discovery.

nodes.label: Chat Fetch API
nodes.rationale: Retrieves recent chat history for a specific room using the Supabase client.

nodes.label: Chat Send API
nodes.rationale: Allows users to post new chat messages, including text, images, and song references.

nodes.label: OG Image Generator
nodes.rationale: Dynamically generates Open Graph preview images for rooms, displaying the current track and recent listeners.

nodes.label: Collaborative Real-time Playback
nodes.rationale: A core architectural pattern where room state and queue are synced across clients via Supabase Realtime.

nodes.label: YouTube Key Rotation System
nodes.rationale: Manages multiple API keys to distribute quota usage and handle exhaustion gracefully.

nodes.label: Anti-Debug Hook
nodes.rationale: Discourages casual inspection of client-side Supabase calls through keyboard blocks, console traps, and timing checks.

nodes.label: useRoomSync
nodes.rationale: Uses Web Worker for heartbeat to survive background tab throttling and prevent cleanup_stale_rooms from deleting rooms while users are active.

nodes.label: useYouTubePlayer
nodes.rationale: Implements silent audio keepalive to keep AudioContext alive on mobile/iOS, but suspends when paused to avoid showing sound icon in browser tab.

nodes.label: YouTube API Rotation
nodes.rationale: Multiplies daily quota by cycling through multiple API keys and handling 403/429 errors with temporary blacklisting.

nodes.label: Agent Documentation
nodes.rationale: States that sync is playlist-level (skips track for everyone) but time-level sync is independent by design.

nodes.label: Window Icon
nodes.rationale: Visual asset representing a window or browser frame.

nodes.label: Vercel Logo
nodes.rationale: Branding asset for Vercel, the hosting platform.

nodes.label: File Icon
nodes.rationale: Visual asset representing a generic file.

nodes.label: Globe Icon
nodes.rationale: Visual asset representing global connectivity or localization.

nodes.label: Next.js Logo
nodes.rationale: Branding asset for the Next.js framework.

nodes.label: OpenGraph Image
nodes.rationale: Default social media preview image for the application. It features a stylized music note icon with a flame-like orange-to-yellow gradient on a dark background.

nodes.label: App Favicon
nodes.rationale: Main application icon/favicon.

nodes.label: Extension Icon (16x16)
nodes.rationale: Small icon for the browser extension toolbar.

nodes.label: Extension Icon (48x48)
nodes.rationale: Medium icon for the browser extension management page.

nodes.label: Extension Icon (128x128)
nodes.rationale: Large icon for the browser extension store listing.
